channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Trump’s promised ‘manufacturing boom’ couldn’t save these Whirlpool jobs  CNN
  2. Trump's tariffs are causing harm to American manufacturers instead of benefiting them  PBS
  3. Automakers Have Revealed Just How Much Trump's Tariffs Are Costing Them  Car and Driver
  4. Trump-Voting Business Owner Decries Painful Havoc Unleashed by Key MAGA Policy  The Daily Beast
  5. Virginia entrepreneurs on Trump’s dodgy tariffs: ‘It disrupts your business’  Virginia Mercury

item.title: How Doomed Is the Price of Oil? An FAQ. - The Ringer
item.description:
1. How Doomed Is the Price of Oil? An FAQ.  The Ringer
  2. Oil prices could reach record highs, analysts warn. Here's what it could mean for the U.S. economy.  CBS News
  3. Inflation expectations flash a warning - but not a long-lasting one  Reuters
  4. Oil Shock Is Latest Test Of US Economy's Resilience  Yardeni QuickTakes
  5. Making the U.S. More Resilient to Oil Price Shocks  Foreign Policy

item.title: Airfares are spiking. Here’s how to navigate the hikes. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Airfares are spiking. Here’s how to navigate the hikes.  The Washington Post
  2. Long-haul Easter flights at risk due to fuel rationing  The Times
  3. Flying in America is about to get more expensive and less fun  NBC News
  4. Europe’s biggest airlines say fuel price spike caused by Iran war will drive up fares  The Guardian
  5. Exclusive: 'No winners' in Middle East crisis, airlines body chief says  Reuters
